items.name: CPU and Memory Requests
items.description: Every container must have CPU and Memory requests defined

pirate_phrases.missing: No ballast in {container}! She'll capsize in rough waters!
pirate_phrases.fixed: Ballast added to {container}, Captain! She'll ride steady now!
pirate_phrases.explanation: Requests are like ballast - they keep yer ship stable by reserving resources. Without 'em, one greedy container can starve the rest.

items.name: CPU and Memory Limits
items.description: Every container must have CPU and Memory limits defined

pirate_phrases.missing: No limits on {container}! One sailor drinkin' all the rum!
pirate_phrases.fixed: Rum rationed for {container}, Captain! No more greedy sailors!
pirate_phrases.explanation: Limits be the rum ration - prevents one container from consuming the entire ship's supplies.

items.name: HPA Min/Max Replicas
items.description: HorizontalPodAutoscaler must have minReplicas and maxReplicas defined

pirate_phrases.missing: No crew limits on {resource}! Could be 1 sailor or 1000 - pure chaos!
pirate_phrases.fixed: Crew size locked for {resource}, Captain! No deserters, no stowaways!
pirate_phrases.explanation: Min/max replicas keep yer crew size in check. Too few and ye sink, too many and ye run out of supplies.

items.name: CPU/Memory Based Scaling
items.description: HPA must have CPU and/or Memory utilization metrics configured

pirate_phrases.missing: {resource} scaling blindly! No CPU or Memory compass to steer by!
pirate_phrases.fixed: Scaling compass installed on {resource}! She'll trim sails to the wind now!
pirate_phrases.explanation: CPU/Memory metrics guide yer scaling like a compass guides a ship through fog.

items.name: HPA Scaling Behaviour
items.description: HPA must have scaleUp and scaleDown behavior policies defined

pirate_phrases.missing: No scaling discipline on {resource}! She'll panic and add crew in a storm!
pirate_phrases.fixed: Scaling discipline enforced on {resource}! Steady as she goes!
pirate_phrases.explanation: Behavior policies prevent yer ship from panicking. Scale up fast, scale down slow - like reefing sails in a squall.

items.name: Requests Per Second Custom Metric
items.description: HPA should use Prometheus-based requests per second custom metric

pirate_phrases.missing: Counting waves would help {resource} scale better, Captain!
pirate_phrases.fixed: Wave counter installed on {resource}! She'll sense storms before they hit!
pirate_phrases.explanation: RPS metric be like counting waves hittin' the hull. More waves = more sailors needed.

items.name: Latency Based Custom Metric
items.description: HPA should use Prometheus-based latency custom metric

pirate_phrases.missing: {resource} be slow to react! Latency metric would give early warning!
pirate_phrases.fixed: Speed gauge installed on {resource}! She'll know when the rudder's slow!
pirate_phrases.explanation: Latency metric tells ye if yer ship's responding slowly. Better to know before the crew mutinies!
